testcase.name: test_ai_recommendations_basic

failure.message: TypeError: object of type 'NoneType' has no len()

testcase.failure: tests/test_backend_api.py:207: in test_ai_recommendations_basic assert len(data["recommendations"]) > 0 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: object of type 'NoneType' has no len()

testcase.name: test_ai_recommendations_minimal
